features: WIDE APPLICATIONS: IP44 Waterproof Christmas Lights Extension Cord is perfect for all kinds of indoor and outdoor string light decorations, such as outdoor coloured lights, LED decorative lights, Christmas trees, icicle lights, curtain lights and other low-voltage LED devices.
HIGH QUALITY MATERIALS: Christmas lights extension cords are made of ABS material with copper core leads, effectively preventing the wires from heating up, safe and durable.

EASY TO OPERATE: The waterproof Christmas light extension cable comes with male and female wire connectors, connect both ends and screw on the included waterproof cover to connect. NOTE: Please check if the two holes of the connector fit your device prior to purchase.

EXTENSION CABLE LENGTH: The length of this waterproof extension cable is 10 metres/33 feet, which can effectively extend the wiring distance between Christmas lights, you don't have to worry that the original string of lights is not long enough.
Package Includes:1 x 10M 33ft extension cable, please check if it is compatible with your device before purchase
description: SIGANDG 10M Christmas Light Extension Cable Specifications: Lead length: 10M/33ft Waterproof:IP44 Material: Copper wire + ABS Installation method: Align the two connectors of the joint insert and tighten, screw on the waterproof cover. End to End Connection, Extension Cable Package Includes: 1 x 10M 33ft extension cable
